features.name: arithmetic left shift with bit-select on shift amount
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic left shift operator (<<<) where the shift amount is a bit-select from a signal (e.g., in2[arg2_bitsize-1:0])

features.name: function computing log2 inside module with for-loop
features.description: Code should include a function defined inside a module that computes log2 using a for-loop with right shift

features.name: parameter computed via function call inside module
features.description: Code should include a parameter whose value is computed by calling a locally-defined function inside the module

features.name: ifdef-ifndef conditional compilation for parameter definition
features.description: Code should include conditional compilation with `ifdef/`ifndef to select between different parameter computation methods

features.name: signed ports with parameter-based bit width
features.description: Code should include input and output ports with signed type and parameter-based bit width
features.snippet:
input signed [BITSIZE_in1-1:0] in1;
output signed [BITSIZE_out1-1:0] out1;
